claim_text_o: The moderated-mediation was greater than zero, index = .06 (95% CI: .02, .11). The strength of the indirect effect increased as religiosity decreased. Hypothesis 2 was supported.
title_o: Sex Education, Public Opinion, and Pornography: A Conditional Process Analysis

claim_text_o: Health Quality Partners reduced hospitalizations by 30 per 100 beneficiaries (33 percent; p=0.02) in the high-risk subgroup [treatment-control difference -0.297 annualized hospitalizations, 90% CI -0.507,-0.086].
title_o: Six Features Of Medicare Coordinated Care Demonstration Programs That Cut Hospital Admissions Of High-Risk Patients

claim_text_o: Beliefs in the vaccines/autism link showed a significant correction-intervention x time interaction [F(3,116)=23.263, p<.001, partial eta2=.376]; the myths-vs-facts correction backfired, raising belief at Time 2 (F(1,29)=31.508, p<.001, partial eta2=.521).
title_o: Misinformation lingers in memory: Failure of three pro-vaccination strategies

claim_text_o: Relative to participants who received no trigger warnings, those receiving them perceived themselves as more vulnerable to persistent negative emotional effects of trauma (B=5.17, t(263)=2.12, p<.05).
journal_o: Journal of Behavior Therapy and Experimental Psychiatry

claim_text_o: Anti-Vaxxers scored higher than Vaxxers on Dark Triad traits Machiavellianism (t=2.813, d=0.27) and Narcissism (t=3.303, d=0.35), both significant at the Bonferroni-corrected level p<=0.0036.
title_o: To vaccinate or not to vaccinate? The role of personality

claim_text_o: Moderate-to-high-risk gamblers showed a stronger automatic approach bias toward gambling than neutral cues (Stimulus x Group F(1,46)=5.49, p=.02, eta2p=.11; within-group t(21)=2.94, p=.008, d=.65).
title_o: Luck, come here! Automatic approach tendencies toward gambling cues in moderate- to high-risk gamblers

claim_text_o: The interaction between perceived stress and resilience on burnout was significant (b=.02, SE=.01, beta=.23, t=2.79, p<.05), indicating resilience moderated/buffered the stress-burnout relationship.
title_o: Resilience as a moderator of stress and burnout: A study of women social workers in India

claim_text_o: Time to sustained insulin use was shortest in cluster 1 (hazard ratio [HR] 26.87, 95% CI 21.17-34.11, vs cluster 5), followed by cluster 2 (10.97, 8.73-13.77, vs cluster 5).
title_o: Novel subgroups of adult-onset diabetes and their association with outcomes: a data-driven cluster analysis of six variables

claim_text_o: Sexual debut during program [PPV girls]: Program effect OR .59*** (95% CI .47-.73). A program effect was responsible for lowering the proportion of PPV girls who initiated sexual activity.
title_o: Quasi-experimental evaluation of a national primary school HIV intervention in Kenya

claim_text_o: Baseline e-cigarette use was associated with greater likelihood of use of any combustible tobacco product averaged across the 2 follow-up periods (OR 4.27 [95% CI 3.19-5.71]; adjusted OR 2.73 [2.00-3.73]).
title_o: Association of Electronic Cigarette Use With Initiation of Combustible Tobacco Product Smoking in Early Adolescence

claim_text_o: Over half (51.9%) of respondents would be willing to see their own provider by telemedicine; 34.9% a different provider same org; 18.6% different org (p<0.001).
title_o: Patient preferences for direct-to-consumer telemedicine services: a nationwide survey

claim_text_o: Total social media use was associated with more depressive symptoms (R2=0.12; F3,4480=207.1; P<.001; f2=0.14), anxiety, and loneliness, controlling for age and gender.
title_o: Social Media Use, Physical Activity, and Internalizing Symptoms in Adolescence: Cross-sectional Analysis

claim_text_o: The 180-day mortality HR was 0.577 (95% CI: 0.474, 0.704) for CCP patients versus matched control patients.
title_o: Comparative Effectiveness of a Complex Care Program for High-Cost/High-Need Patients: a Retrospective Cohort Study

claim_text_o: Six different classes of dementia care dyads were identified, based on best BIC, significant likelihood ratio test (p<0.001), high entropy (0.87).
title_o: Sociodemographic aspects and health care-related outcomes: a latent class analysis of informal dementia care dyads

claim_text_o: In the UK, more frequent general news use broadened awareness of false claims (b=.06 [.003,.11]) but weakened false belief acquisition (b=-.53 [-.74,-.32]).
title_o: The impact of news media and digital platform use on awareness of and belief in COVID-19 misinformation

claim_text_o: Sons receive an additional 0.37 months of breastfeeding relative to daughters (Table 3 col.1: Male=0.3681***, SE 0.0384, p<0.01, N=110,183).
title_o: Why Do Mothers Breastfeed Girls Less than Boys? Evidence and Implications for Child Health in India

claim_text_o: The most important predictor of intention was perceived benefits (beta=.41, P<.001), followed by self-efficacy (.25) and perceived barriers (-.21).
title_o: Adoption of a Contact Tracing App for Containing COVID-19: A Health Belief Model Approach
